violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw hamburger touching apples in the walk in cooler.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. -No sign on the salad bar telling customers to use a clean plate.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
